## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions (see AGENTS.md)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] No new lint warnings (`go vet ./...`)

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] test: Test additions/updates
- [ ] docs: Documentation only
- [ ] chore: Maintenance
